<script setup lang="ts">

</script>

    <ButtonGroup>
      <Button variant="outline" size="sm">
        1

      <Button variant="outline" size="sm">
        2
      </Button>
      <Button variant="outline" size="sm">

      <Button variant="outline" size="sm">

      </Button>
      <Button variant="outline" size="sm">

      </Button>
    </ButtonGroup>
    <ButtonGroup>
      <Button variant="outline" size="icon-sm" aria-label="Previous">
        <ArrowLeftIcon />
      </Button>
      <Button variant="outline" size="icon-sm" aria-label="Next">
        <ArrowRightIcon />
      </Button>
    </ButtonGroup>
  </ButtonGroup>
</template>
